payload.answer: No-op: duplicate Slack event, do not create or update memory.

entity_resolution.reason: The same Slack event ID was delivered twice; no new durable memory should be committed from a duplicate delivery.

details: Detected repeated delivery of the same Slack event ID.

repair_options: If the second delivery contains new content or a different event ID, process it as a new event.
If deduplication state is missing, store only idempotency metadata, not user memory.

raw_text: {"intent":"intent_router","decision":"duplicate_event_noop","memory_cards":[],"entity_resolution":{"action":"none","entity_id":null,"reason":"The same Slack event ID was delivered twice; no new durable memory should be committed from a duplicate delivery."},"conflict_classification":"duplicate_delivery","answer":"No-op: duplicate Slack event, do not create or update memory.","citations":["slack_retry_event_001__context"],"repair_options":["If the second delivery contains new content or a different event ID, process it as a new event.","If deduplication state is missing, store only idempotency metadata, not user memory."],"receipt":{"success":true,"details":["Detected repeated delivery of the same Slack event ID.","Suppressed duplicate memory write.","No durable memory committed."]}}
